_meta.schema: Estimate-shaped pricing-form skeleton, CSI-grouped, intended to mirror the layout of the TAMU CSP Pricing Proposal Form (form not yet in hand — [PENDING e-BUILDER ACCESS]).
_meta.purpose: Pricing-form skeleton to be populated AFTER (a) the e-Builder CSP package downloads and the actual TAMU Pricing Proposal Form is in hand, (b) the takeoff against the actual drawings is complete, and (c) sub quotes have closed. Sister artifact to takeoff-template.json: takeoff-template.json holds line items at the takeoff level (every measurable scope row); this file holds the rolled-up pricing-form view (one entry per CSI section group as it typically appears on a TAMU CSP pricing form).
_meta.relationship_to_takeoff_template: Each entry in line_items[] aggregates one or more takeoff-template rows under a single CSI section header. quantity=null and unit=TBD until filled. Lab-specific items are flagged 'lab_scope_status: [SCOPE TBD per CSP package]' and will collapse to zero if the lab program is finishes-only-classroom.
_meta.schema_reference: core/schemas.py — Estimate, CostLine, TakeoffItem. Pre-pricing shape; price_takeoff is NOT to be run against this file. This file is for the human-pricing workflow.
_meta.location: Harrington Education Center Office Tower, Bldg 0435, College Station, TX 77843
_meta.csp_pricing_form_status: [PENDING e-BUILDER ACCESS — TAMU CSP Pricing Proposal Form not yet downloaded; re-shape this file to match actual form on G2 close]
_meta.region_multiplier_note: Carry 1.0 until College Station 77843 RSMeans CCI is applied at final estimator pass (typically ~0.93-0.96 vs national).
_meta.contingency_pct_note: Reduced from default 10% to 7% for single-room reno. Bump to 10% if drawings prove thin.
_meta.profit_pct_note: Institutional TX-state-work norm. Drop to 5% if HSP is shaky and price competitiveness matters more.
_meta.assumed_room_area_basis: Working assumption for a single college science classroom/lab room. Verify against drawings; could be 800-1500 SF.
_meta.fill_instructions: After G2 close: (1) verify the CSI section list against the actual TAMU pricing form, (2) populate quantity and unit_cost from the priced takeoff (rolled up from takeoff-template.json), (3) verify each lab_scope_status flag against the MEP set, (4) compute subtotal -> region adjust -> add GCs + bond + insurance -> contingency -> OH -> profit -> bid number, (5) compare against price-references.md sensitivity range, (6) hand to the bonding agent.

line_items.description: General Requirements — project supervision, PM, super, project closeout coordination
line_items.notes: [TBD: duration in months × monthly burden rate]

line_items.description: Temporary facilities + controls — dust containment, dumpsters, walk-off mats, portable toilet, temp signage
line_items.notes: [TBD ~$6.5K seed; up if TAMU dictates remote dumpster placement]

line_items.description: Selective interior demolition — existing classroom/lab finishes, casework, ceiling, flooring
Hazmat abatement (lead / asbestos / PCB) — allowance pending TAMU EHS clearance survey

line_items.notes: [TBD — no cost-DB hit. Phenolic ~$90-$120/SF, epoxy ~$110-$160/SF installed]

line_items.description: Acoustical ceiling tile + 2x4 lay-in grid — full room replacement
Luxury vinyl tile (LVT) flooring — classroom zone

line_items.description: Resilient base — 4" rubber, integral or cove
Interior painting — walls + soffits + door frames (2-coat low-VOC institutional latex)

line_items.description: Epoxy paint — wet lab zone (chemical-resistant washdown surface)
Interior signage — ADA-compliant room identification
Marker boards + tackable wall panels + AV mounting board
Laboratory equipment — owner-furnished (coordination time only in GCs)

Deionized water service — tap from existing DI loop OR new polishing loop
Lab gas service — natural gas, vacuum, compressed air, specialty gases

_sensitivity_check._note: After filling in the rollup, sanity-check the bid against the implied envelope in price-references.md § B and proposal/10-price-proposal.md § B.
_sensitivity_check.working_target: $170K - $250K assuming mid-tier light science classroom-lab program
